_comment: Tier-2: NGSolve LinearForm rejects a vector-valued CoefficientFunction when integrating against a scalar test function. Raises NgException('SymbolicLFI needs scalar-valued CoefficientFunction'). Third NGSolve fixture clearing the critic's 3-per-backend floor — covers the integrand-shape mismatch family (LinearForm, the dual to the existing BilinearForm/SymbolicBFI ones).
